---
id: post-login

description: "Authenticates the user against a Navidrome instance. On success, sets the `spotter_token`"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Submit login credentials"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/login"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Authenticates the user against a Navidrome instance. On success, sets the `spotter_token`
cookie and redirects to the home page. On failure, returns the login form with an error message.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./post-login.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./post-login.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
